changes: ODST movement is head-relative again, not hand-based (GitHub issue #18).
ODST cutscenes no longer pull in the focal length; they match Halo 3 (#18).
ODST controller rumble is steady instead of intermittent (#18).

In-game menu no longer goes dead after Save & Quit: the virtual XInput slot stays reported as connected through the title-teardown window so MCC never latches a false controller disconnect. Title-agnostic.
rebuild_note: Source rebuilds are not byte-identical because the DLL embeds compile date/time and toolchain output can differ. The launcher was rebuilt from the accepted source, so its bytes differ from 0.2.1 while its behavior does not.
